scenes.text: In this lecture, we will explore the basic concepts of Docker, a platform for developing, shipping, and running applications inside containers. Docker provides a standard way to package an application along with its dependencies, making it easy to execute in a consistent environment. We will cover how Docker containers can streamline development processes, increase portability across different environments, and improve resource efficiency.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker] --> B[Containers]; A --> C[Images]; A --> D[Docker Files]; B --> E[Portability]; B --> F[Isolation]; C --> G[Layering]; D --> H[Build]; D --> I[Versioning];
